name: What evidence do I need for a work neck injury claim in Salt Lake?
description: Medical records, witnesses, photos, causation expert opinion.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for a work neck injury claim in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Medical records, witnesses, photos, causation expert opinion.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Medical records linking injury to work, incident reports, witness statements, photos of scene.[1][2] Expert opinions on causation essential.[1] Key factors: (1) Doctor notes on mechanism of injury; (2) MRI/X-rays showing damage; (3) Work logs proving duties caused it. Preserve all from day one. Strong evidence wins claims.
